cards.back: A function that assigns a real-number value to each outcome of a random experiment
A function that describes the probability of a continuous random variable taking on a specific value
A function that describes the probability of a discrete random variable taking on a specific value
The long-run average value of a random variable, calculated as the sum of each possible value multiplied by its probability
A measure of the spread or dispersion of a probability distribution, calculated as the square root of the variance
